titlestmt.titleproper: David J. Skorton Cornell University presidential inauguration records3-15-3561
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-12-25 18:19:55 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: David J. Skorton Cornell University presidential inauguration records
did.abstract: Correspondence, articles, media handbooks, planning documents, proclamations, congratulatory certificates, plaques, and other records relating to David Skorton's inauguration and inaugural festivities.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, articles, media handbooks, planning documents, proclamations, congratulatory certificates, plaques, and other records relating to David Skorton's inauguration and inaugural festivities.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University David J. Skorton presidential inauguration records, #3-15-3561. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Cornell Chronicle (special inauguration coverage issue) and broadsides
Office of Multi-Media Development and Production

U. I. College of Public Health
